title: https://github.com/ShunsukeHayashi/agent-skill-bus FUGUE/Kernelに必要か、批判的吟味せよ
summary_text: 以下の1本に絞るのがよいです。`local spool + receipt` 契約だけを検証し、authority/routing は触れません。 **提案テスト** - 追加先: [test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/tests/test-run-kernel-orchestration.sh) - 対象: [run-kernel-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L1) **Stub bridge の挙動** - `KERNEL_LANE_BRIDGE_BIN` を `TMP_DIR/fake-bridge` に向ける。 - `KERNEL_LANE_BRIDGE_SCRIPT=""` を設定して、script path 非付与分岐（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L126](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L126)）を通す。 - `fake-bridge` は引数 `--provider --role --task --cwd --output-format --file` を受ける。 - provider ごとの返却: - `codex`: `{"ok":true,"requestedProvider":"codex","provider":"codex","role":"reviewer","model":"gpt-5-codex"}` - `claude`: `{"ok":true,"requestedProvider":"claude","provider":"copilot","role":"reviewer","model":"","failedOverFrom":"claude","fallbackReason":"command_failed"}` - `glm`: `{"ok":false,"requestedProvider":"glm","provider":"glm","role":"critic","unavailable":true,"failureClass":"unavailable","reason":"ZAI_API_KEY missing"}` - さらに `fake-bridge` は呼び出し内容を `invocations.jsonl` に追記して `--file` 伝播を確認可能にする。 **主要アサーション** 1. artifact 生成 - `RUN_DIR` が stdout から取得できる。 - `matrix.json`, `lane-jobs.jsonl`, `all-results.json`, `integrated.json`, `summary.md` が存在（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L88](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L88), [#L101](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L101), [#L189](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L189), [#L192](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L192), [#L243](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L243)）。 2. integrated 契約 - `source == "fugue"`, `handoff_id`, `context_file` が CLI 指定値。 - `lane_count == 3`, `ok_count == 2`, `fail_count == 1`（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L193](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L193)）。 - `fallback_used == true`（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L196](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L196)）。 - `observed_models` に `requestedProvider=claude, provider=copilot, failedOverFrom=claude` を含む（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L197](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L197)）。 3. lane-jobs 契約 - 行数 3。 - 各行に `task/source/handoff_id/context_file` が埋まる（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L115](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L115)）。 4. context-file 伝播 - `invocations.jsonl` の全行で `file` が canonical path（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L74](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L74), [#L137](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L137)）。 5. summary の人間可読面 - `fallback used: true` と `lane count: 3` を含む（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L244](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L244)）。 **起こりやすい失敗点（このテストで拾える/拾いたい）** - 並列 append で `lane-jobs.jsonl` が壊れる可能性（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L124](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L124)）。 - lane 出力が空でない非JSONだと `jq -s` で集約失敗（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L149](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L149), [#L190](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L190)）。 - `MAX_PARALLEL` 非数値で算術評価エラー（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L178](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/scripts/local/run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L178)）。 - `include` が空配列だと `agent-*.json` glob 問題で失敗し得る（[run-kernel-orchestration.sh#L181](/Us...
